# Upgrade Plan

## Overview
Upgrade Java project to latest LTS versions (Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4).

## Tasks
See tasks.json for detailed task breakdown and execution status.

### 001-upgrade-java-spring-boot
Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4, including:
- JDK upgrade to version 21
- Spring Boot upgrade to version 3.4
- Spring Framework upgrade to 6.x
- Migration from javax.* to jakarta.* namespace if applicable
- Update all related dependencies to compatible versions
